# Plumbing Work Permit Requirements in Dallas, TX. Whether you need a building permit for your Plumbing Work project depends on the scope of work — here's what Dallas's building department requires. Replacing an existing plumbing fixture (faucet, toilet, garbage disposal) in the same location does not require a plumbing permit. Water heater replacement requires a plumbing permit even when replacing with the same type and size. Rerouting or replacing supply or drain lines requires plumbing and potentially building permits. # How to get a building permit in Philadelphia. If you're in Philadelphia, here's how you can get your building permit.*.
